the force with which the airstream acts on a sail can be calculated using the formula:  
f = (b s rho (v0 - v)^2) / 2  

at a certain moment, the instantaneous wind power reaches its maximum value.  
the speed of the sailboat at this moment is the value of v that maximizes the power.  

the power is proportional to (v0 - v)^2.  
to maximize this, v0 - v must be as large as possible.  

the maximum occurs when v = v0 - v, where v is the speed of the sailboat.  

the speed of the sailboat at this moment is v = v0 - v.
